hero.headline: The crew that *climbs higher* than the rest
hero.subheadline: 40-foot windows, awkward angles, impossible gutters — we show up with ladders and get it done.

services_section.label: THE CLIMB
services_section.heading: What we handle up there
services_section.subheading: Professional equipment for every height and angle

services.title: Gutter Cleaning & Repair
services.description: Complete gutter maintenance from cleaning to minor repairs. We handle the heights so you don't have to.

services.title: High Window Cleaning
services.description: Residential and commercial windows at any height. Ladders, squeegees, and the skills to reach what others can't.

services.title: Pressure Washing
services.description: Driveways, siding, decks, and rooflines. Complete exterior cleaning that makes your property shine.

services.title: Holiday Light Installation
services.description: Professional Christmas light hanging for tall peaks and difficult rooflines. Setup and takedown included.

about.heading: Built for the tough jobs
about.body: We're the Greenville crew that doesn't back down from height or difficulty. Professional equipment, fair pricing, and we show up when we say we will.

reviews.name: Tarina J.
reviews.text: First to reach out for a very high roof cleaning job. Squeezed me in last minute, super fair prices, and did a great job.

reviews.name: Jane R.
reviews.text: Used them for 10 years. Big windows 40 feet up — the crew is brave and thorough. House sparkles when they leave.

reviews.name: Becky W.
reviews.text: Amazing what they can do on ladders with awkward, difficult windows. Will keep using them as long as I have this house.

cta.heading: Ready for the heights?
cta.body: Free estimates on all gutter and window cleaning. Professional equipment, fair pricing, and we show up on time.
